content.en:
Grunt!

Ye Tian swallowed the Heavenly Xuan Fruit in one gulp, and began to practice another exercise.

What he is running now is not the Tian Yuan True Method, the Tian Yuan True Law is a life-level exercise created by the Lord of the Yuan Gu, and it is of little use to the seventh order of life.

What he was running now was a life-level exercise that he had obtained from Hamon's soul memory—the Tianxuan True Technique!

Tianxuan True Technique was an exercise that Hamon accidentally obtained, not an exercise of the Tibetan God Organization, so he did not make an oath, and as for the exercises of the Tibetan God Organization, they all collapsed with the oath, and Ye Tian had no way to learn it.

But being able to get the Tianxuan True Technique is already very good, at least the Tianxuan True Technique is indeed very good, much more powerful than the Tianyuan True Technique, because the Tianxuan True Technique is a secret technique that directly points to the eighth order.

There are better exercises, and Ye Tian naturally abandoned the Tianyuan True Method.

With the help of the Tianxuan True Technique, Ye Tian quickly refined the medicinal power of the Tianxuan Fruit and slowly advanced his life level to the late seventh order.

Rumble!!!

At the moment when the Heavenly Xuan Fruit was about to be exhausted, Ye Tian's life level finally broke through and reached the late stage of the seventh order.

At the same time, Ye Tian's physical strength naturally broke through, and it was much stronger than before.

Naturally, Ye Tian's combat power also increased.

"Before, my combat power was not too strong among the fifth-rank supremes, and it was only by relying on the Hunyuan Slash that I was able to compete with the top fifth-rank supremes, and I only competed with one or two, and I couldn't last. But now, my combat power should really have stepped into the ranks of the top fifth-rank supremes!"

Ye Tian estimated.

However, he was only guessing, and he didn't really fight with the top fifth-rank supreme, so he couldn't make a specific judgment.

Then, Ye Tian left this secret room and broke the barrier of the secret room on the right.

In this secret room, Ye Tian also found a lot of charms, secret techniques, chaos black crystals and other resources, and also found a top-notch chaos spirit treasure, and it was a defensive chaos spirit treasure.

It can be said that this defensive Chaos Spirit Treasure is equivalent to four or five top-notch Supreme Treasures!

Ye Tian walked the Chaos Dao, which was more in line with the Chaos Spirit Treasure, so this Chaos Spirit Treasure was very important to Ye Tian, enough to increase his defense a lot.

It can even be said that the defense against the Chaos Spirit Treasure and the Chaos Origin Ancient Well is enough for Ye Tian not to be afraid of the attacks of the fourth-rank supreme.

In other words, it is a little difficult for a supreme like Kunwu Supreme to hurt Ye Tian.

"There's one last barrier, I wonder if I can break it?"

Ye Tian said curiously.

He made his way to the last chamber and struck with a chaotic sword, but it didn't shake the barrier.

"What a powerful barrier!"

Ye Tian exclaimed.

Boom Boom Boom !!

He bombarded again and again, but no number of attacks could shake the barrier.

"Try it with Hunyuan Slash!"

Ye Tian thought.

"Hunyuan Slash!"

The Hunyuan Slash containing a terrorist attack bombarded the barrier, but it still failed to break the barrier.

However, Ye Tian found that this blow still shook the enchantment.

"According to my estimate, if it is more powerful, such as an attack comparable to that of a third-class supreme, it should be able to break through this barrier! According to my estimate, the Tibetan God Organization probably wants to wait for Hamon and the others to break through to the realm of Tianzun before breaking through this barrier. From this point of view, the treasures in this secret room must be very precious!" Ye Tian guessed.

Unable to break this barrier, Ye Tian was only a little bit of a pity, and he didn't get too entangled.

"When I'm stronger, I'll break this barrier again, and the last secret room in the first secret realm that Harmon discovered has not been broken. When the time comes, I will have the most precious treasures of the two secret realms, and maybe I can make my strength skyrocket again!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

After a few minutes, Ye Tian calmed down.

This time, he obtained a large number of resources, some of which also had a significant effect on his cultivation of the Chaos Golden Desolation Technique, and the secret techniques in the chaos had a significant reference effect on him.

Therefore, he needed a lot of time to comprehend these exercises and secret techniques and practice.

"Let's start the retreat here, but there's one more thing to deal with!"

What Ye Tian wanted to deal with was the existence of the reincarnators, and he wanted to spread this secret.

If the Reincarnated One is in league with those Supremes of the Twelve Cosmic Eras, he will definitely not spread it, and it will be useless to spread it.

Judging from the current situation, those supreme beings of the Twelve Universe Epochs did not know about the existence of reincarnation, and if the existence of reincarnation was leaked, it could be fooled that these reincarnated beings possessed the true secret of transcendence and countless resources.

In this way, many supreme beings in the universe will go to trouble the reincarnated, and even want to kill the reincarnated for resources.

"If it spreads like this, it should bring some trouble to these reincarnateds, and even kill a few reincarnateds!"

Ye Tian thought.

He also had no choice but to do this, the strength of these reincarnated people increased very quickly, and their original realm might even be higher than the Lord of the Yuan Gu, if he didn't do this, wouldn't it be troublesome if these reincarnated people were raised to the level of surpassing the Lord of the Yuan Gu?

Not only did he have to spread the news, but he had to exaggerate it.

"Harmon killed a son of the era before, and also clashed with the Supreme of Cause and Effect, this news spreads, and the Supreme of the Twelve Universe Era will definitely believe it 100%!"

Ye Tian said with a smile.

So, Ye Tian let his second deity move.

The second deity is of little value, even if it is exposed, it doesn't matter, it's a big deal not to have this second deity.

......

A year later.

A piece of news spread throughout the universe—

The Hidden God Organization, the Chaos Reincarnation, the countless Chaos Resources, the secrets of the Transcendent......

It can be said that no matter which rumor is enough to alarm the entire universe.

At the first moment, the Lord of the Yuan Gu and the others gathered the other supremes and started a meeting.

Yuangu Palace.

Seeing that the other Supreme Beings had sent their avatars to arrive, the Lord of the Yuan Gu opened the meeting.

"You should have seen the recent rumors, the Hidden God Organization, the Reincarnation, the Transcendent Secrets, and countless Chaos Resources...... Who came up with these rumors, and they haven't been found out yet, but how true and how false do you think this news is?"

The main road of the Yuangu.

"The matter of the reincarnated should be true!"

The person who spoke was none other than the Cold Spirit Supreme.

She explained: "You still have to have my disciple killed by a mysterious master, that mysterious master is very unfamiliar, and can even use a spell to cut the causal line of the cause and effect supreme, is there such a spell in the universe? Even the Heavenly Fu Supreme who is proficient in talismans cannot create such a talisman. Originally, we had some guesses that that person was from Chaos, but now combined with this rumor, the mysterious master should be a reincarnated one! According to rumors, that reincarnated person's strength in the chaos is stronger than ours, and the realm is very high, so he can exert his powerful strength in the Domination Realm and easily kill a son of the era!"

"The question I'm thinking about now is, if the reincarnated person is real, does it have anything to do with that adult?"

The Golden Light Supreme frowned.

The Lord!

As soon as all the Supremes heard this, they frowned one by one.

"You don't want that Lord to be the Hidden God Organization, do you?" said the Lord of the Ancient Ageures.

"It's not impossible!" Cold Spirit Supreme sneered: "According to rumors, it is precisely because we suppressed the Origin of the Universe that these powerhouses in the chaos can be reincarnated into the universe. What I'm worried about is that if these reincarnated beings return to their peak strength and have a strength far beyond ours, maybe one person will suppress us, and then we won't have any use value! If so, those reincarnated people can take our place, and will we still be useful?"

"This ......"

All the Supremes panicked in their hearts.

Oh, yes!

If they were not useful, wouldn't those reincarnated beings kill them one by one if they surpassed them in strength.

At that time, let alone detachment, it is a question of whether they can survive or not!

"Lord of the Yuangu, what to do now, you can give a suggestion!"

The Golden Light Supreme asked.

The Lord of the Yuan Gu was silent, originally he thought that according to the plan of the Lord, as long as the two universes collided, they could work for transcendence.

But now, things are changing so fast.

"We can't contact that adult, let's go directly to find those reincarnated, those reincarnated people must have a big secret on them, in case we get some rare resources or information, it will be good for us. Anyway, the Lord didn't say that these reincarnated people were his subordinates, so it doesn't matter if we destroy the reincarnated. If we contact that adult, it won't be easy to do it!"

The Lord of the Progenitals proposed.

The Golden Light Supreme added, "We also need to find the person who spread the news, maybe it is someone from other forces of Chaos, or simply a person who killed a reincarnated person and obtained information!"

"Well, let's do it then!"

The Lord of the Yuan Gu nodded.

......

On the other side, after Ye Tian used the second deity to spread the news, he directly annihilated the second deity, and the desolate lord ordered the third deity to be refined, entered the desolate realm, and became the new lord of the desolate realm.

This is also done for the sake of insurance.

In case the Twelve Cosmic Epochs or other reincarnated beings pay a certain price and really find the second Buddha-figure, then everything will be exposed.

So, to be on the safe side, there is absolutely no problem in doing so.

Moreover, Ye Tian also used a spell from the secret realm to cut off the line of cause and effect between himself and the second deity, so that it could be foolproof.

For Ye Tian, there can be no possibility of exposure.
